items.scenario: You are a junior majoring in environmental engineering. You missed the second half of last week's hydrology lecture because of a medical appointment, and a graded quiz on that material is scheduled for this Friday. You want to catch up before the quiz.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Linwood. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you missed part of the lecture
Ask whether the quiz can be taken after a review session
Suggest a short meeting before Friday
items.subject: Catching up on hydrology before Friday's quiz

items.scenario: You recently started a part-time marketing assistant role at a small bookstore. Your supervisor asked the team to share initial impressions of a new customer-feedback tool that has been generating unusually long response times since it was introduced last Monday.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Caldwell. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the response-time problem you have observed
Tell her how it has affected customer follow-up
Suggest a possible adjustment to the workflow
items.subject: Initial impressions of the new feedback tool

items.scenario: You ordered a refurbished tablet from an online electronics retailer about three weeks ago. The screen flickers whenever the tablet is tilted, and the included charging cable produces a clicking sound when plugged in. The warranty period is still active.
items.direction: Write an email to Customer Service. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the screen and cable problems clearly
Tell them which model you purchased and when
Ask for a replacement or full refund option
items.subject: Flickering screen and faulty cable on refurbished tablet

items.scenario: You volunteer most weekends at a small neighborhood arts center that runs a free children's painting workshop. The center recently posted that Saturday sessions will be cut from three hours to one hour starting next month because of budget concerns.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Hollister. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe what you have seen children gain from longer sessions
Explain why a one-hour format would be difficult for younger participants
Suggest a compromise schedule the volunteers could support
items.subject: Concern about shortening the Saturday painting workshop
